Thank you for contributing to Chorus! 

**Description**
Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR. What problem does it solve, or what feature does it add?

**Related Issue**
If this PR addresses an open issue, please link it here (e.g. `Fixes #123`).

**Verification**
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My code follows the repository's coding standards.
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation as necessary.

**Contributor License Agreement**
Before we can merge your changes, you must sign the Chorus Contributor License Agreement (CLA). If you haven't yet, please refer to the contributing guidelines for instructions.
